prompt: A long ancient stone tunnel stretching deep into absolute darkness. A single file line of twenty torch-bearers standing from foreground to far background. The first figure in the foreground holds a massive roaring torch, face brilliantly lit in amber-orange. Each successive figure deeper in the tunnel holds a progressively smaller, dimmer flame. The last five figures at the far end are near-invisible dark silhouettes holding dying embers that cast almost no light. The tunnel walls glow blazing warm orange at the front, fading to near-total cold darkness at the far end. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, cinematic, photorealistic, ultra-detailed. No text, no labels, no diagrams, no floating elements anywhere in the image.
metaphor: Torchbearers in a tunnel each pass a fraction of their light forward; by the final figures, the signal has nearly disappeared into darkness.
